Title: Relates to detaining persons for longer than twenty-four hours
Summary: Relates to detaining persons for longer than twenty-four hours.
LawCode: Amd §140.20, add Art 3 §3.10, CP L; amd §7009, CPLR
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the criminal procedure law and the civil practice law and rules, in relation to detaining persons for longer than twenty-four hours
